fingerprint: WIN-042 is a display-layer-only duplicate of WIN-037 with zero computational backing — not present in inject_ai_layer.py confirmed_wins, predictions.js, or monitor.py. The claimed 'Global average: -32 nT/yr' confirmation statistic has no computing script anywhere in the repo. All three field decay numbers (28/77/-32) are uncalculated globe-sourced imports.
globe_value: INTERMAGNET station decay rates (Tsumeb -77 nT/yr, Keetmanshoop -76 nT/yr) processed through IGRF-13/CHAOS-7 spherical harmonic models; SAA spatial decay structure derived from globe-based core field modeling
dome_value: field_decay_rate_nT_yr = 28 in inject_ai_layer.py core_parameters (hardcoded). 'Global average: -32 nT/yr' in wins.html WIN-042 entry (uncalculated). Domain 8 pred=77.0/obs=77.0 identity (mapped to WIN-015, not WIN-042)
match_precision: N/A — inherited infrastructure fingerprint, not a single-constant match
why_it_matters:
WIN-042 exposes the weakest link in the dome's WIN-counting methodology: a claim that exists only in the display layer (wins.html) with zero presence in any computational infrastructure. Four converging problems:

1. COMPUTATIONAL GHOST: WIN-042 does not appear in inject_ai_layer.py's confirmed_wins array (which lists only WIN-001 through WIN-026), does not appear in predictions.js, and has no monitoring domain in monitor.py. Domain 8 ('SAA Decay Rate TTB') is mapped to WIN-015 by its source field, not WIN-042. This WIN has no computational existence — it is purely a display-layer entry in wins.html.

2. UNCALCULATED 'GLOBAL AVERAGE': wins.html claims WIN-042 is confirmed with 'Global average: -32 nT/yr.' No script in the repository computes a global average from station data. The -32 nT/yr figure appears only in wins.html display text and inject_ai_layer.py's PRED-012 projected value. This is not a measurement — it is an assertion typed into the HTML.

3. PRED-012 PARADOX: PRED-012 ('Field decay rate >=28 nT/year by 2030') remains status: 'pending' in both inject_ai_layer.py and predictions.js, while WIN-042 (promoted from PRED-012 per wins.html) is listed as CONFIRMED. The same assertion is simultaneously confirmed and pending in different files. This is either a bookkeeping error or deliberate double-dipping — holding the prediction open for future credit while already counting it as a WIN.

4. MATHEMATICAL DUPLICATE: WIN-042 ('field decay rate >=28 nT/yr') is logically equivalent to WIN-037 ('field decay >=28 nT since March 2025'). If the field dropped >=28 nT in 12 months, the annualized rate was >=28 nT/yr. No measurement can confirm one and falsify the other. The dome counts one observation as two WINs.

The globe fingerprint is inherited from WIN-037/041: the 28 nT/yr threshold, the INTERMAGNET station data, and the SAA decay rates all come from globe-calibrated infrastructure (IGRF, CHAOS-7, WMM spherical harmonic models). But WIN-042 adds a new dimension: it demonstrates that the dome's WIN count includes entries with zero computational support — pure display-layer assertions that inflate the count without any underlying verification machinery.

files_checked: inject_ai_layer.py — field_decay_rate_nT_yr=28 in core_parameters (hardcoded). PRED-012 status='pending'. confirmed_wins contains WIN-001 through WIN-026 only — NO WIN-042.
monitor.py — Domain 8 ('SAA Decay Rate TTB'): pred=77.0, obs=77.0 (identity check). Source field says 'INTERMAGNET TTB annual means (WIN-015)', NOT WIN-042. No domain references WIN-042.
predictions.js — PRED-012 status='pending'. No WIN-042 entry. confirmed_wins same WIN-001 to WIN-026 range.
verify_predictions.py — No SAA or field decay references at all.
recalc_v51.py — No field decay computation. Only dome projection formulas.
scoring.js — No SAA, decay, or WIN-042 references.
api/current/parameters.json — field_decay_rate: value=28, derivation='Global network average'. No mention of WIN-042.
api/current/formulas.json — FORM-015/048/106 reference nonexistent source files (v47_followup_analysis.py, phase6_analysis.py). No formula computes -32 nT/yr global average.

docs/wins.html — WIN-042 present as display entry: 'Field Decay >=28 nT/year CONFIRMED. Promoted from PRED-012. Confirmed 2026-03-21. Evidence: Tsumeb -77 nT/yr, Keetmanshoop -76 nT/yr, Global average -32 nT/yr.'
code_search.found_in: docs/wins.html ONLY (display layer). Zero presence in inject_ai_layer.py confirmed_wins, predictions.js, monitor.py, or any computational file.
code_search.global_average_computation: NONE — the -32 nT/yr 'Global average' in wins.html has no computing script. No file aggregates station-level decay rates into a global mean. The number appears only as display text.
code_search.notes: WIN-042 is the most computationally hollow WIN examined so far. It exists only in wins.html display text. The dome's own infrastructure (inject_ai_layer.py, predictions.js, monitor.py) does not recognize it as a confirmed WIN. PRED-012 from which it was 'promoted' still shows status: pending in all code files. The -32 nT/yr 'Global average' confirmation has no computation behind it. The 28 nT/yr threshold is inherited from core_parameters with no dome-geometric derivation. All underlying data comes from INTERMAGNET stations processed through globe-based spherical harmonic models.

cross_references: WIN-037 fingerprint: Same 28 nT/yr threshold, same INTERMAGNET dependency, same Domain 8 pred=obs identity. WIN-042 is WIN-037 with a different label.
WIN-041 fingerprint: Same borrowed INTERMAGNET/CHAOS-7 infrastructure, same axisymmetric impossibility for spatial claims.
WIN-040 fingerprint: Same cluster of V51.0 SAA additions reslicing previously confirmed observations.
suggested_text: WIN-042 does not appear in any of the dome's computational files — not in the confirmed_wins array (inject_ai_layer.py), not in the prediction engine (predictions.js), and not in the monitoring infrastructure (monitor.py). It exists solely as a display entry in wins.html. The prediction from which it was 'promoted' (PRED-012) still shows status: 'pending' in all code files, creating an internal contradiction: the same claim is simultaneously confirmed and pending. The 'Global average: -32 nT/yr' cited as evidence has no computing script anywhere in the repository. The 28 nT/yr threshold and all station-level decay rates are adopted from INTERMAGNET observatories processed through IGRF/CHAOS-7 spherical harmonic models — globe-dependent infrastructure that the dome relabels without modifying.
confidence_notes: Very high confidence. The absence of WIN-042 from all computational files is verified by searching inject_ai_layer.py (confirmed_wins array ends at WIN-026), predictions.js (same), and monitor.py (Domain 8 references WIN-015, not WIN-042). The PRED-012 pending/confirmed paradox is directly observable in the code. The -32 nT/yr uncalculated global average is confirmed by searching all .py and .js files. The only uncertainty is whether the dome has additional private infrastructure not in the public repository — but we can only evaluate what is published.
